text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Before we know it, it's already the final day of
summer camp.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Phew... Well... I think that was a productive
summer camp!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Because I was trying to go one-on-one with a
bear!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
The final day of camp is the time to put your
progress to the test, right? So I wanted to see
how much my power has improved!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
But unfortunately, I wasn't able to find any
bears...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I tried calling out to them, searching through the
grass, pulling up tree roots... But I couldn't find a
single one...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
T-Trainer? Why are you on the ground? And why
do you look so pale?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
S-somebody call an ambulance! Don't die on me,
Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I wasn't at risk of dying, but the thought of
Kawakami Princess fighting a bear was far too
horrifying. I tell her not to attempt that ever
again.
